sections.short-biography: Opposed the invasion of Shu so Sima Zhao had him executed.

sections.literary-appearances: Romance of the Three Kingdoms: 115Jin Shu: 2
sections.biography-source-undefined:
Deng Dun was a general in service to Wei. When Sima Zhao proposed invading Shu, Deng Dun claimed that Shu could not be taken over. Sima Zhao had him killed on the spot in a display of resolution.

房玄齡《晉書》：將軍鄧敦謂蜀未可討，帝斬以徇。

full_text:
Deng Dun 鄧敦
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Dun (鄧敦). Opposed the invasion of Shu so Sima Zhao had him executed. Deng Dun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Deng Dun lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

Deng Dun was a general in service to Wei. When Sima Zhao proposed invading Shu, Deng Dun claimed that Shu could not be taken over. Sima Zhao had him killed on the spot in a display of resolution.
房玄齡《晉書》：將軍鄧敦謂蜀未可討，帝斬以徇。
